steps.title: Identify the missing clause
steps.content: After the introductory phrase, the sentence needs a subject and verb before "68th in a global ranking." The antecedent is the constitution of Lithuania, a singular document.

steps.title: Choose pronoun plus verb
steps.content: Choice A and choice B are possessive pronouns and do not supply a verb. Choice D supplies a plural subject and verb, but the antecedent is singular. The remaining choice means "it is," giving the sentence the needed singular subject and linking verb. The answer is C.
